description_long: This is a yellow, polygonal postbox with a sloped, pyramid-like top and a robust, angular body. The front face features a horizontal mail slot near the top, directly above a rectangular collection times panel, and a keyhole for access. Both side panels display a bold, black postal service logo, which resembles a stylized post horn. The rear is plain, lacking any visible openings or markings. The postbox is constructed from metal, likely steel, and stands on a slightly recessed dark base, suggesting it is designed to be freestanding on sidewalks or near roads. Its surface is smooth and hard, with a matte finish and minimal reflectivity.
description: A yellow, metal postbox with a sloped top, front mail slot, and postal logos on both sides. It features a collection times panel and a sturdy, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mail slot, collection times panel, and keyhole on the yellow face.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the black postal service logo on a plain yellow panel.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain yellow surface and no visible openings or markings.
description_view_3: Right side view with the same black postal service logo as the left side.
attribute_mail_slot_location: centered on the front face near the top
attribute_collection_times_panel: rectangular panel below the mail slot on the front face
attribute_postal_service_logo: black painted post horn logo on both side panels
attribute_door_or_access_panel: large rectangular door on the front face below the mail slot
attribute_posting_aperture_design: horizontal rectangular slot with beveled edges
